\tzpentry{ID4778}{Text Number Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4778 introduces Text Number Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\tP_{\\text{total}} = \\sum_{j=1}^{N} \\eta_{\\text{total}} P_{j}\n\\end{equation}
